questions.prompt_text: A moving particle starts at an initial position (1, 0, 0) with initial velocity i - j + k . Its acceleration at time t is a (t) = 4t i + 6t j + k . Find its velocity and position at time t > 0.

choices.label: A
choices.html: v(t) = (2t2 - 1) i + (3t2 - 1) j - (t + 1) k;  r(t) = (t3 + t + 1) i - (t3 - t) j + (t2 + t) k

choices.html: v(t) = (2t2 + 1) i + (3t2 + 2) j + (t + 1) k;  r(t) = (t3 + t + 1) i + (t3 + 2t) j + (t2 + t) k

choices.label: D

choices.label: E
choices.html: v(t) = (2t2 + 1) i + (3t2 - 1) j + (t + 1) k;  r(t) = (t3 + t + 1) i + (t3 - t) j + (t2 + t) k

The branch at the top is concave up passing through the point (0, 4) and the branch at the bottom is concave down passing through the point (0, negative 4). An ellipse, C = 0. The ellipse passes through the points (4, 0), (0, 2.5), (negative 4, 0), and (0, negative 2.5). A circle, C = negative 1.
